overview: AI-powered examination management platform with role-based access for administrators, teachers, and students. Teachers create exams with a question builder, upload answer keys and rubrics, and review AI-generated grades. Students submit answers and view personalized feedback. Admins manage users and monitor system analytics.
features: Role-based access: admin, teacher, student dashboards
Exam creation with question builder (multiple choice + essay)
AI grading engine via OpenAI integration
File uploads for answer keys, rubrics, and student submissions
Teacher score override and grade export
Student performance history and per-question feedback
Admin user management and activity logs
